hero.subtitle: Trusted Aviation Partner
hero.desc: A leading aviation enterprise in the region with many years of experience, qualified personnel and a complete material-technical base.

fleet.label: Products
fleet.desc: Manufacturing and repair of over 8,500 aircraft of various types over 85 years
fleet.cat1_desc: Over 8,500 different types of aircraft have been manufactured by the company throughout its history, from LaGG-3 to Su-25.
fleet.cat2_desc: Full overhaul, modernization and technical maintenance of Mi-8, Mi-17, Mi-24 and Mi-35 type helicopters.
fleet.cat3_desc: Full overhaul, modernization of Su-25 and Su-25UB combat aircraft and the Su-25 GE-31 project.

innovation.label: Innovation
innovation.desc: JSC Tbilisi Aircraft Manufacturing develops future aviation concepts — from Business Jet class aircraft to ELITE-Jet created with modern composite technologies.
innovation.feat1_desc: 6-seat and 9-seat ELITE-Jet NG — built with composite materials and modern technologies. Office and entertainment systems, Sat com, DVD/CD, aerial show system.
innovation.feat2_desc: New GE-31 attack aircraft — a Su-25 modification with new Western-made avionics, engines, radio-electronic and flight-navigation systems.
innovation.image_caption: ELITE-Jet Civilian Aircraft 6 seater ELITE-Jet and 9 seater ELITE-Jet NG, made of composite materials with modern technology

partners.label: Partners
partners.regionsDesc: The same partnership map is shown above, with the covered regions listed below for quick reference.

news.label: News
news.art1_title: Successful Testing of New Hybrid Engine
news.art1_excerpt: The first hybrid engine successfully passed rigorous testing in all categories and will be added to production in the coming years.
news.art2_excerpt: With the expansion of our partnership, a new regional cargo route begins, covering containers and cargo.
news.art3_title: AIR Georgia — Best Regional Aircraft Manufacturer of the Year
news.art3_excerpt: At the International Aviation Awards, our company received the title of Best Regional Aircraft Manufacturer of the Year.

contact.desc: Join over 200 competent professionals. Discover what our aircraft can do and enhance your air fleet.

footer.tagline: Leading aviation enterprise in the region
